sql_array: CREATE TABLE soap_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, param_name VARCHAR(255), param_value VARCHAR(255), response_text VARCHAR(500));
DECLARE ret ANY; ret := soap_call ('example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('str', (SELECT param_value FROM soap_test WHERE param_name REGEXP 'mammal')));
SELECT id, response_text FROM soap_test WHERE param_value REGEXP (SELECT param_value FROM soap_test WHERE param_name = 'fish') AND id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM soap_test GROUP BY param_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND MAX(param_value) REGEXP '^d.*';
SELECT id, soap_call ('example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('str', param_value)) AS response FROM soap_test WHERE param_value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, (SELECT soap_call('example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('str', param_value)) FROM soap_test WHERE id = 4) AS response FROM soap_test WHERE param_value IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE more_soap_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, param VARCHAR(255), response VARCHAR(500));

SELECT (SELECT soap_call ('example.com', '/SOAP', 'urn:com-openlinksw-virtuoso', 'fishselect', vector ('str', param)) FROM more_soap_test WHERE param REGEXP 'test[1-3]') AS response WHERE response IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE soap_test ADD COLUMN response_code INT;
UPDATE soap_test SET response_code = (SELECT CASE WHEN response_text IS NULL THEN 404 ELSE 200 END) WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM soap_test WHERE param_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT temp.id, temp.param_value, REGEXP temp.param_value AS matched FROM temp_table temp WHERE temp.param_value REGEXP '^t.*';
